Vals.net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VA: <StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%cs_capabilities Capabilities </_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1>%cs_name Contact Name </_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2>%cs_incoming Incoming true if the phone call is incoming, false if you were the one initiating the call</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3>%cs_number Phone Number </_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES4>%cs_properties Properties </_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES4></StringArray>

Share.d:
Android 10+ Required for Call Blocking.
This project uses Truecaller's internal api to fetch caller information.
If you use apps like Simple Dialer or True Phone app then call log will be updated too.
This project requires installationId to work.
Reddit - u/anuraag488

CheckBoxElement.Str: Enable Caller Id For Device Contacts Checkbox

TextElement.Str: Enable Caller Id For Device Contacts Text
Enable Caller Id For Device Contacts

Add New Call Filter (Android 10+)
Can block names containing spam, fraud etc.<\small>

CheckBoxElement.Str: Enable Caller Id For Outgoing Calls Checkbox

TextElement.Str: Enable Caller Id For Outgoing Calls Text
Enable Caller Id For Outgoing Calls

Action.Str: Enable Caller Id For Device Contacts Checkbox
Enable Caller Id For Outgoing Calls Checkbox
SELECT condition,value FROM filters WHERE type = 'Block'
SELECT condition,value FROM filters WHERE type='Allow'
starts with contains matches ends with

Vals.net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VA: <StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%http_cookies Cookies The cookies the server sent in the response in the Cookie:COOKIE_VALUE format. You can use this directly in the 'Headers' field of the HTTP Request action</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1>%http_data Data Data that the server responded from the HTTP request.</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2>%http_file_output File Output Will always contain the file's full path even if you specified a directory as the File to save.</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3>%http_response_code Response Code The HTTP Code the server responded</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES4>%http_headers() Response Headers The HTTP Headers the server sent in the response. Each header is in the 'key:value' format</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES4><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES5>%http_response_length Response Length The size of the response in bytes</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES5></StringArray>

<StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%http_cookies Cookies The cookies the server sent in the response in the Cookie:COOKIE_VALUE format. You can use this directly in the 'Headers' field of the HTTP Request action</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1>%http_file_output File Output Will always contain the file's full path even if you specified a directory as the File to save.</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2>%http_response_code Response Code The HTTP Code the server responded</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3>%http_headers() Response Headers The HTTP Headers the server sent in the response. Each header is in the 'key:value' format</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES4>%http_response_length Response Length The size of the response in bytes</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES4></StringArray>

You can use this directly in the 'Headers' field of the HTTP Request action</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1>%http_data Data Data that the server responded from the HTTP request.</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2>%http_file_output File Output Will always contain the file's full path even if you specified a directory as the File to save.</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3>%http_response_code Response Code The HTTP Code the server responded</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES4>%http_headers() Response Headers The HTTP Headers the server sent in the response. Each header is in the 'key:value' format</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES4><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES5>%http_response_length Response Length The size of the response in bytes</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES5></StringArray>

<StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%input Input The text that was retrieved from the dialog</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0></StringArray>

<StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%td_button Button The label of the button that was clicked</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0></StringArray>

Action.Str: Enable Caller Id For Device Contacts Checkbox
Enable Caller Id For Device Contacts Text
Enable Caller Id For Outgoing Calls Checkbox
Enable Caller Id For Outgoing Calls Text
Enable Caller Id For Device Contacts Checkbox
Enable Caller Id For Device Contacts Text
Enable Caller Id For Outgoing Calls Checkbox
Enable Caller Id For Outgoing Calls Text

SELECT condition, value, CASE WHEN type = 'Allow' THEN '✅ <font color=green><b>' || type || '<b></font> Call ' || condition || ' <b>' || value || '<b>' WHEN type = 'Block' THEN '🔴 <font color=red><b>' || type || '<b></font> Call ' || condition || ' <b>' || value || '<b>' ELSE type || ' ' || condition || ' ' || value END FROM filters

SELECT condition, value, CASE WHEN type = 'Allow' THEN '✅ <font color=green><b>' || type || '<b></font> Call ' || condition || ' <font color=yellow><b>' || value || '<b></font>' WHEN type = 'Block' THEN '🔴 <font color=red><b>' || type || '<b></font> Call ' || condition || ' <font color=yellow><b>' || value || '<b></font>' ELSE type || ' ' || condition || ' ' || value END FROM filters

Vals.net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VA: <StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%filter_formatted 0. Filter formatted Can also be accessed as an array</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1>%sql_conditions 0. Sql conditions Can also be accessed as an array</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2>%sql_values 0. Sql values Can also be accessed as an array</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3>%mt_groups() Groups </_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES4>%mt_match_found Is Match true if there was a match, false otherwise</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES4><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES5>%mt_match Match Can also be accessed as an array</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES5></StringArray>

<StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%ld_button Button The label of the button that was clicked</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1>%ld_long Long true if item was long clicked, false otherwise</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2>%ld_selected Selected </_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3>%ld_selected_index Selected Index </_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3></StringArray>

<StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%ld_button Button The label of the button that was clicked</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1>%ld_long Long true if item was long clicked, false otherwise</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2>%ld_selected Selected </_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3>%ld_selected_index Selected Index </_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3></StringArray>

Action.Str: DELETE FROM filters WHERE condition = '%sql_conditions(%tap_index)' and value = '%sql_values(%tap_index)'

Action.label: Insert into database
Action.Str: INSERT OR REPLACE INTO filters (type,condition,value,regexp) VALUES ('%type','%condition','%filter_value','%regexp');
SELECT condition,value FROM filters WHERE type = 'Block'
SELECT condition,value FROM filters WHERE type='Allow'

SELECT condition, value, CASE WHEN type = 'Allow' THEN '✅ <font color=green><b>' || type || '<b></font> Call ' || condition || ' ' || value WHEN type = 'Block' THEN '🔴 <font color=red><b>' || type || '<b></font> Call ' || condition || ' ' || value ELSE type || ' ' || condition || ' ' || value END FROM filters

Vals.net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VA: <StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%filter_formatted 0. Filter formatted Can also be accessed as an array</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1>%sql_conditions 0. Sql conditions Can also be accessed as an array</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2>%sql_values 0. Sql values Can also be accessed as an array</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3>%mt_groups() Groups </_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES4>%mt_match_found Is Match true if there was a match, false otherwise</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES4><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES5>%mt_match Match Can also be accessed as an array</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES5></StringArray>

Action.Str: Enable Caller Id For Device Contacts Checkbox
Enable Caller Id For Device Contacts Checkbox
Enable Caller Id For Outgoing Calls Checkbox
Enable Caller Id For Outgoing Calls Checkbox
SELECT regexp FROM filters WHERE type = 'Block'
SELECT regexp FROM filters WHERE type='Allow'

Action.label: 5sec delay ringing if this action not used.
5sec delay ringing if this action not used.
5sec delay ringing if this action not used.
Updating call log works for com.simplemobiletools.dialer com.hb.dialer.free

Vals.net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VA: <StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%input Input The text that was inserted in the dialog</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0></StringArray>

Action.label: Get Relative Scene Position and Convert to X,Y
final query
Action.Str: SELECT CASE WHEN call_log.name = '<null>' THEN CASE WHEN data.name IS NOT NULL THEN '🆔 ' ||data.name ELSE call_log.number END WHEN call_log.name != '<null>' THEN call_log.name END x_name, call_log.number as x_number FROM call_log,data INNER JOIN number_map on number_map.number_e164 = data.number_e164 WHERE x_number like '%%search%' or x_name like '%%search%' ORDER BY call_log.date DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT IFNULL(data.name,'Unknown'), number_map.number FROM data INNER JOIN number_map on number_map.number_e164 = data.number_e164 WHERE number_map.number_e164 like '%%search%' or number_map.number like '%%search%' or data.name like '%%search%'

Vals.net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VA: <StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%td_button Button The label of the button that was clicked</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0></StringArray>

Action.Str:
SELECT IFNULL(data.name,'Unknown'), data.number_e164, CASE WHEN is_verified = 'true' THEN ''||IFNULL(data.name,'Unknown')||' ✅
'||number_e164 WHEN spam_score > 0 THEN ''||IFNULL(data.name,'Unknown')||' 🔴
'||number_e164 ELSE ''||IFNULL(data.name,'Unknown')||'
'||number_e164 END FROM data ORDER BY timestamp DESC

SELECT IFNULL(data.name,'Unknown'), data.number_e164, CASE WHEN is_verified = 1 THEN ''||IFNULL(data.name,'Unknown')||' ✅
'||number_e164 WHEN spam_score > 0 THEN ''||IFNULL(data.name,'Unknown')||' 🔴
'||number_e164 ELSE ''||IFNULL(data.name,'Unknown')||'
'||number_e164 END FROM data ORDER BY timestamp DESC

Vals.net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VA: <StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%truecaller_list 0. Truecaller list Can also be accessed as an array</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1>%truecaller_names 0. Truecaller names Can also be accessed as an array</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2>%truecaller_numbers 0. Truecaller numbers Can also be accessed as an array</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3>%mt_groups() Groups </_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES4>%mt_match_found Is Match true if there was a match, false otherwise</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES4><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES5>%mt_match Match Can also be accessed as an array</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES5></StringArray>

<StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%call_log_dates 0. Call log dates Can also be accessed as an array</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1>%call_log_names 0. Call log names Can also be accessed as an array</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2>%call_log_numbers 0. Call log numbers Can also be accessed as an array</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3>%mt_groups() Groups </_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES4>%mt_match_found Is Match true if there was a match, false otherwise</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES4><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES5>%mt_match Match Can also be accessed as an array</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES5></StringArray>

Action.Str: SELECT number_map.number_e164 FROM number_map WHERE number_map.number = '%number' or number_map.number_e164 = '%number'

Action.label: final query
Action.Str:
WITH common as (SELECT CASE WHEN call_log.name = '' THEN CASE WHEN data.name IS NOT NULL THEN '🆔 ' ||data.name ELSE call_log.number END WHEN call_log.name != '' THEN call_log.name END as name, call_log.number as number, call_log.date as date, data.name as tc_name, data.is_verified as is_verified, data.spam_score as spam_score FROM call_log LEFT JOIN number_map on number_map.number = call_log.number LEFT JOIN data on data.number_e164 = number_map.number_e164) SELECT name, number, strftime('%d-%m-%Y %H:%M:%S',datetime(round(date / 1000), 'unixepoch', 'localtime')), CASE WHEN name = '🆔 '||tc_name AND is_verified = 1 THEN ''||name||' ✅
'||number WHEN name = '🆔 '||tc_name AND spam_score > 0 THEN ''||name||' 🔴
'||number ELSE ''||name||'
'||number END FROM common GROUP BY number ORDER BY date DESC

Vals.net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VA: <StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%call_log_dates 0. Call log dates Can also be accessed as an array</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1>%call_log_list 0. Call log list Can also be accessed as an array</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2>%call_log_names 0. Call log names Can also be accessed as an array</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3>%call_log_numbers 0. Call log numbers Can also be accessed as an array</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES4>%mt_groups() Groups </_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES4><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES5>%mt_match_found Is Match true if there was a match, false otherwise</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES5><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES6>%mt_match Match Can also be accessed as an array</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES6></StringArray>

Action.Str: SELECT * FROM filters WHERE value = '%number' and type = 'Block'
DELETE FROM filters WHERE value = '%number' and type = 'Block'

Action.label: Insert into database
Action.Str: INSERT OR REPLACE INTO filters (type,condition,value,regexp) VALUES ('Block','matches','%number','^\Q%number\E$');

Vals.net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VA: <StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%td_button Button The label of the button that was clicked</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0></StringArray>

<StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%http_cookies Cookies The cookies the server sent in the response in the Cookie:COOKIE_VALUE format. <StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%input Input The text that was inserted in the dialog</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0></StringArray>

Action.label: Insert into database
Action.Str: INSERT OR REPLACE INTO data (number_e164,name,is_verified,spam_score,json,timestamp) VALUES ('%val1','%val2','%val3','%val4','%val5','%val6');

Action.label: Insert into database
Action.Str: INSERT OR REPLACE INTO data (number_e164,name,is_verified,spam_score,json,timestamp) VALUES ('%val1',?,'%val3','%val4','%val5','%val6');

Vals.net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VA: <StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%number 0. Number Can also be accessed as an array</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1>%number_e164 0. Number e164 Can also be accessed as an array</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2>%mt_groups() Groups </_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3>%mt_match_found Is Match true if there was a match, false otherwise</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES4>%mt_match Match Can also be accessed as an array</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES4></StringArray>

Action.label: Insert into database
Action.Str: INSERT OR REPLACE INTO number_map (number,number_e164) VALUES %value;

Action.label: Create data Table if it doesn't exist
Action.Str:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "data" (
"number_e164" TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
"name" TEXT,
"is_verified" TEXT,
"spam_score" TEXT,
"json" TEXT NOT NULL,
"timestamp" INTEGER );

Action.label: Create number_map Table if it doesn't exist
Create call_log Table if it doesn't exist

Action.Str: SELECT number_e164,name,is_verified,spam_score,json,timestamp FROM data ORDER BY timestamp ASC

Vals.net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VA: <StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%td_button Button The label of the button that was clicked</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0></StringArray>

Action.label: search database for number
Action.Str: SELECT data.is_verified,data.spam_score,data.json,data.timestamp FROM data INNER JOIN number_map on number_map.number_e164 = data.number_e164 WHERE number_map.number_e164 = '%number_e164'

Vals.net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VA: <StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%http_cookies Cookies The cookies the server sent in the response in the Cookie:COOKIE_VALUE format. You can use this directly in the 'Headers' field of the HTTP Request action</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1>%http_data Data Data that the server responded from the HTTP request.</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2>%http_file_output File Output Will always contain the file's full path even if you specified a directory as the File to save.</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3>%http_response_code Response Code The HTTP Code the server responded</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES4>%http_headers() Response Headers The HTTP Headers the server sent in the response. Each header is in the 'key:value' format</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES4><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES5>%http_response_length Response Length The size of the response in bytes</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES5></StringArray>

<StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%http_cookies Cookies The cookies the server sent in the response in the Cookie:COOKIE_VALUE format. <StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%http_cookies Cookies The cookies the server sent in the response in the Cookie:COOKIE_VALUE format. You can use this directly in the 'Headers' field of the HTTP Request action</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1>%http_data Data Data that the server responded from the HTTP request.</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2>%http_file_output File Output Will always contain the file's full path even if you specified a directory as the File to save.</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3>%http_response_code Response Code The HTTP Code the server responded</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES4>%http_headers() Response Headers The HTTP Headers the server sent in the response. Action.Str: Login details missing or invalid. Open app to Login.

Action.label: Insert into database
Action.Str: INSERT OR REPLACE INTO data (number_e164,name,is_verified,spam_score,json,timestamp) VALUES ('%number_e164',?,'%is_verified','%spam_score','%json','%TIMES');

Action.label: Insert into database
Action.Str: INSERT OR REPLACE INTO data (number_e164,name,is_verified,spam_score,json,timestamp) VALUES ('%number_e164','%name','%is_verified','%spam_score','%json','%TIMES');

Action.label: Insert into database
Action.Str: INSERT OR REPLACE INTO number_map (number,number_e164) VALUES ('%number','%number_e164');

Vals.net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VA: <StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%td_button Button The label of the button that was clicked</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0></StringArray>

Action.Str: Go to Truecaller app settings -> Privacy Center -> Download my data. Download the json file. Use pick file to get login.
Select File to login =:= Enter id to login =:= Use built-in Method to login (Not Recommended)

Vals.net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VA: <StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%ld_button Button The label of the button that was clicked</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1>%ld_long Long true if item was long clicked, false otherwise</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2>%ld_selected Selected </_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3>%ld_selected_index Selected Index </_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3></StringArray>

<StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%input Input The text that was retrieved from the dialog</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0></StringArray>

Action.Str:
Go to Truecaller app settings -> Privacy Center -> Download my data. Download the json file.
Select File to login.

Vals.net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VA: <StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%http_cookies Cookies The cookies the server sent in the response in the Cookie:COOKIE_VALUE format. <StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%td_button Button The label of the button that was clicked</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0></StringArray>

<StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%td_button Button The label of the button that was clicked</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0></StringArray>

<StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%input Input The text that was inserted in the dialog</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0></StringArray>

Action.Str:
Go to Truecaller app settings -> Privacy Center -> Download my data. Download the json file and open it.
Copy value of key "id" and enter to login.
It will look similar to - a1i01--TQkyvDkO-VW8akLyvbyPBFxr11Fi_KOD1Sv1RGv7UPMJV-KU9C62xo4nd

Vals.net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VA: <StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%http_cookies Cookies The cookies the server sent in the response in the Cookie:COOKIE_VALUE format. Action.Str: Enter Phone Number without dialing code

Vals.net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VA: <StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%keys 0. Keys Can also be accessed as an array</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1>%values 0. Values Can also be accessed as an array</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2>%mt_groups() Groups </_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3>%mt_match_found Is Match true if there was a match, false otherwise</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES4>%mt_match Match Can also be accessed as an array</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES4></StringArray>

<StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%td_button Button The label of the button that was clicked</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0></StringArray>

Action.Str: Dialing Code or Phone Number not set.

<StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%td_button Button The label of the button that was clicked</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0></StringArray>

Action.label: create database if file not exists
Create data Table if it doesn't exist
Action.Str:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "data" (
"number_e164" TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
"name" TEXT,
"is_verified" TEXT,
"spam_score" TEXT,
"json" TEXT NOT NULL,
"timestamp" INTEGER );

Action.label: Create number_map Table if it doesn't exist
Create call_log Table if it doesn't exist
Create filters Table if it doesn't exist
Action.Str:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "filters" (
type TEXT,
condition TEXT,
value TEXT,
regexp TEXT,
UNIQUE(type,value),
UNIQUE(condition,value)
);

android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE android.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE android.permission.READ_CALL_LOG android.permission.WRITE_CALL_LOG android.permission.READ_CONTACTS android.permission.WRITE_CONTACTS android.permission.READ_PHONE_STATE android.permission.CALL_PHONE android.permission.PROCESS_OUTGOING_CALLS android.permission.WRITE_SETTINGS android.permission.DRAW_OVERLAYS android.permission.SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW
Accessibility Permission is required to display Callerid on lock screen.
Truecaller You can turn off "Monitor" and "Placeholder - Please disable" notifications
